2,511

Member of Parliament for Milton Keynes Central 🌹 All queries, casework and invitations should be sent to Emily.darlington.MP@parliament.uk

emily4mk



View Instagram post by emily4mk


Apr 30



Open post by emily4mk with ID 18119625280631417



It was lovely to attend the Guide Dogs reception in Parliament to learn more about the role that guide dogs play in the lives of young people with visual impairment.

Many young people are not getting the support they need to confidently navigate life with a visual impairment and Guide Dogs are determined to change this by fighting for early support.

It was also International Guide Dogs Day yesterday – a day to celebrate the fantastic work these dogs do! 🐶

#miltonkeynes #guidedogs

It’s not every day that you get the opportunity to try your hand at some pottery in between Parliamentary business!

Fun fact: pottery is my favourite way to unwind after a long week in Parliament 🏺

Apr 30



Open post by emily4mk with ID 17887603194481773



I was so glad to see so many MPs attend the Charity Shop pop-up that I hosted with Willen Hospice in Parliament!

It was a great opportunity to talk about the fantastic work that Willen Hospice do and discuss how integral palliative care is.

I look forward to seeing my colleagues wearing their incredible stock in the Chamber and around the Houses of Parliament – #sustainablystylish

14



1

emily4mk



View Instagram post by emily4mk


Apr 28



Open post by emily4mk with ID 18173389015407309



For victim-survivors, waiting for your chance to have your voice heard in court can be unbearably retraumatising. This government’s committed to making sure there is swift justice for victims of alleged rape and sexual violence, and so it’s absolutely imperative that if the Romanian court process isn’t proceeding, the CPS must be allowed to proceed at pace with its 21 charges against the Tate brothers.

https://www.dailymail.com/news/article-15771851/Starmer-new-calls-extradite-Andrew-Tate-Romania-courts.html

…





14



1

emily4mk



View Instagram post by emily4mk


Apr 28



Open post by emily4mk with ID 18005691515872213



Willen Lake, Loughton Valley Park, Waterhall Park, Caldecotte Lake, Campell Park – the list goes on!

We are so lucky to have so many green spaces in our city some which are looked after by the Council and many by the amazing Parks Trust – they are places for families, exercise, social events, celebrations and so much more.

We should have so much pride in our green spaces – what park or lake in Milton Keynes is your favourite?

#miltonkeynes #greenspaces #lovemk #mkshorts

…





18



1

emily4mk



View Instagram post by emily4mk


Apr 28



Open post by emily4mk with ID 18390163855089614



Great news! Milton Keynes College is getting £1 million in funding from the Government to support refurbishment and repair works.

MK College has played a role in the educational journeys of so many across this city, giving them access to opportunities, learning and training.

This investment comes alongside the other incredible things that Labour has done for higher education including expanding access to apprenticeships, supporting teachers with development opportunities and guaranteeing a college place for every 16-year-old at risk of dropping out.

#highereducation #mkcollege #miltonkeynes #lovemk

…





8



0

emily4mk



View Instagram post by emily4mk


Apr 28



Open post by emily4mk with ID 17848443441692734



The rise of technologies such as AI must happen alongside the input of women, we have seen how these technologies can revolutionise but also degrade. The use of AI apps to nudify women online is completely unacceptable.

I was glad to attend the End Violence Against Women event to launch their report “VAWG-Coded”. This report focuses on how the landscape of violence against women and girls is changing – the growing role of AI being one of these things.

AI must be harnessed to support women, not harm them.

…

32



0

emily4mk



View Instagram post by emily4mk


Apr 24



Open post by emily4mk with ID 18224020540313200



Last Friday we held the finals of the MK School Debate: Shenley Brook End vs Hazeley!

Both schools did an incredible job defending their sides and put forward knowledgeable and assured arguments – ultimately, we saw the 2026 crown go to Hazeley, congratulations to their amazing team! And another congratulations to Shenley Brook End for making it to the finals and fighting with just as compelling arguments. 🏆

A huge thank you to every school who participated throughout the competition and the schools who joined us for a tour around Parliament!

Tune in later this year for another round 🌟

#miltonkeynes #youngleaders #lovemk

…

emily4mk



View Instagram post by emily4mk


Apr 24



Open post by emily4mk with ID 18044788133773687



It was lovely to meet the team at Esquires Coffee which recently opened on Glebe Farm!

A coffee shop will have a huge role in creating a social centre for the community here in Glebe Farm ☕️

What a perfect spot to stop for a bite to eat between talking to local residents on canvassing sessions 🌹

#coffee #community #lovemk #miltonkeynes

28



2

emily4mk



View Instagram post by emily4mk


Apr 21



Open post by emily4mk with ID 17891920500328956



Last week I hosted a charity shop pop-up to celebrate the role of charity shops on our high streets and within our local communities – they’re a place to shop, learn more about sustainable fashion and donate towards incredible causes 👗

I’m so thrilled to say that through this event we raised £1,134 for Willen Hospice!

A huge thank you to their retail staff whose expertise and dedication made the event a reality 🌟

Willen Hospice and the compassionate care and services they offer are a cornerstone of our city – we’re forever grateful for what they do 💙🦢

#charityshop #willenhospice #lovemk #miltonkeynes

emily4mk



View Instagram post by emily4mk


Apr 17



Open post by emily4mk with ID 17886118050370009



I’m so proud that Milton Keynes has been long listed for the UK City of Culture – we are truly a fabulous city with so much to offer from culture to art to food.

I’m excited to show off our incredible new music venue right by the train station which will be another asset to MK’s entertainment scene.

#miltonkeynes #lovemk #arts #cityofculture

…





67



4

emily4mk



View Instagram post by emily4mk


Apr 15



Open post by emily4mk with ID 18179096959389284



So thrilled to join some of my fellow MPs for the launch of the renewed Women’s Health Strategy today.

I’ve spoken a lot about the dire state of women’s healthcare; from institutionalised medical misogyny, to the underfunding of research, to the epidemic of women being gaslit by healthcare professionals. The effect it’s had on every generation of women won’t fade overnight, but I’m really encouraged by the excellent steps being taken in this renewed strategy and I’m so glad to have a government that wants to take the sexism out of healthcare.

#womenshealth #ukpolitics #nhs #miltonkeynes #uklabour

…





43



0

emily4mk



View Instagram post by emily4mk


Apr 15



Open post by emily4mk with ID 18039904334572606



Here in Milton Keynes we’re so proud of our City Centre with its arts, culture and shopping.

Being part of the New Towns Programme is so important for us continuing to grow as a city and make our city centre a place to be all day!

We should be able to work, eat and play in our city centre and this vision is certainly becoming a reality 🌟

#miltonkeynes #lovemk
